summary:
There is a recognized but very low incidence of Guillain-Barré syndrome linked to COVID-19 vaccines, supported by post-marketing surveillance and individual case reports. The association is considered real within medical literature despite its rarity compared to other causes such as viral infections. 

The summary above was generated using only information present in Agent1’s response; no external knowledge has been added.
